title: Change blueprint — specification
question: Does this specification say what we will build — and what we will not?
lede: Gate A reviews the shape of the change before any plan exists.
gateQuestion: Approve this specification as the contract for the change?
inputs: the clarified requirements this spec answers
nonGoals: what this change explicitly will not do
assumptions: an assumption to verify before Gate B

options.label: Approve the specification
options.consequence: Scope locks; the implementation plan (Gate B) is drafted next.

options.label: Request changes
options.consequence: The spec reopens with your notes.

options.label: Reject the direction
options.consequence: The change is shelved with its evidence preserved.

recommendation.reason: State why, grounded in the evidence above.

openStatusLabel: Gate A open — no resolution proposed yet
